title: artemisia borealis subsp. mertensii
intro: Artemisia borealis subsp. mertensii, also known as Merten's sage or Merten's wormwood, is a subspecies of the plant Artemisia borealis that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Merten's sage include reducing inflammation, relieving headaches and colds, and promoting healthy digestion. Herbal preparations of Merten's sage include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
